description: Build a Go/No-Go inhibitory control experiment in PsychoPy Builder for a clinical neuropsychology study. Participants must respond to frequent 'go' stimuli (green circles, 75% of trials, SPACE key) and withhold response to infrequent 'no-go' stimuli (red circles, 25% of trials). Each stimulus displays for 1.0 second with a 0.5-second fixation cross between trials. The experiment must include instructions, a practice block of 8 trials with accuracy feedback ('Correct!' or 'Incorrect!' for 1 second), a break screen, a main experimental block (minimum 2 repetitions of the conditions loop), and a debrief screen. Create a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/go_nogo_conditions.csv with columns: stimColor, trial_type, and corrAns ('space' for go, 'None' for nogo). Save the experiment as /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/go_nogo_experiment.psyexp. Login: user ga, password password123
